title: APM: Browser Attack Trace Correlation
description: Link analysis grouping events by Trace ID across all SOC sources. Each link group shows the full lifecycle of one logical request: browser telemetry, backend service spans, and any WAF signal that matched the same Trace ID. Use this widget to pivot from a flagged browser attack to the upstream WAF rule that observed the same exchange.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs') and 'Trace ID' != '' | link span = 5minute 'Trace ID', 'Log Source', 'Service Name'

ask_ai_prompts: Which Trace IDs spanned both APM and WAF in the last hour?
For the top-volume trace, list every step in chronological order.
